_source: Design/fundamentals/environment.md §2 — starter phrases, refine iteratively with Ivan
_changelog: 0.3.0 (Phase D): все дискретные оси мигрированы с phrase на атомарные tokens (builder предпочитает tokens); модификаторы (anomaly/thermal/biomass/artifact) остаются phrase. 0.2.0 (A0): Torches → wall-mounted iron; Chasm walkways origin-нейтральны; oil lanterns убраны из HumanGarrison; organic-токен убран из max anomaly-модификатора.

baseStyle._lightingRule: Источник света задаёт ось lighting (по умолчанию Torches). Свет ТОЛЬКО локальный — факелы, бра, дворфьи артефакты, геотермальные жилы (на Reheating). Никаких прорубов в потолке, дневного света, неба, god-rays, ambient-засветки. См. comfyui_api_integration.md §7. lightingDirective идёт первым в промпте — там у SDXL максимальный attention.
baseStyle.lightingDirective: deep underground world with no sun and no electricity, warm firelight the only kind of illumination, warm orange-red color temperature, most of the scene drowned in shadow, low-key chiaroscuro lighting, single visible flame as the brightest point, sharp falloff into pitch black
baseStyle.positive: dark fantasy underground environment, fully enclosed sealed ceiling, industrial decay, grim oppressive atmosphere, muted limited color palette, highly detailed environment concept art
baseStyle.negative: bright, colorful, cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, watermark, text, signature, oversaturated, cheerful, sunny, modern, hole in ceiling, ceiling opening, opening to surface, broken ceiling, collapsed ceiling, sky, sky light, skylight, daylight, sunlight, sun rays, god rays, light shaft from above, beam of light from ceiling, outdoor lighting, natural daylight, overcast sky, stars, moon, bright ambient light, soft daylight, even illumination, top-down lighting, overhead lighting, fill light from above, high-key lighting, well-lit scene, bright atmosphere, atmospheric daylight haze, glowing fog above, cinematic key light, dramatic rim light from above, cold lighting, blue lighting, cool white light, bluish glow, cyan glow, blue color cast, teal color cast, cold color grading, moonlight, cold ambient glow, fluorescent light, LED light, neon light, electric light, modern lighting, studio lighting, white light, pale white glow, grey ambient light, blue-grey light, silver light, cool highlights, desaturated cold tones, overcast ambient light, skylight ambience, light from unseen source

depth.label: Depth
depth.description: глубина этажа; driver для AnomalyIntensity и ThermalZone

lighting.label: Lighting
lighting.description: источник света в кадре; в мире нет солнца и электричества — только огонь, геотермика и кристаллы

values.label: Crystal
tokens: luminous mineral crystals in the walls

values.label: Human-Adapted
tokens: crude human retrofits over dwarven stonework

values.label: Human Exiles
tokens: scrawled mad glyphs on the walls

camera.label: Camera
camera.description: ракурс и кадрирование сцены — чисто визуальная ось для мудборда, не влияет на лор

values.label: Establishing Wide
tokens: expansive view of the whole space

values.label: High Angle Down
tokens: high angle looking down into the depths
strong sense of the drop below

values.label: Threshold
tokens: dark frame around a lit interior beyond

condition.label: Condition
condition.description: степень сохранности постройки/пространства (env.md §9 — изношенный/изломанный/повреждённый); ортогональна Origin

occupancy.label: Occupancy
occupancy.description: насколько обжито пространство и свежесть следов (ecosystem.md); ортогональна Occupant (кто именно живёт)

values.label: Old Traces
tokens: old faded traces of past habitation

anomalyModifiers.phrase: subtle perspective shifts, faint reality bleed at the edges of vision
impossible geometry, warped angles, distorted shadows, unstable flickering light, materials that seem wrong
deeply surreal impossible geometry, fractured reality, hallucinatory atmosphere, light bleeding from nowhere

Cooling.phrase: cold air, thin frost on metalwork, breath condensing

DeepFreeze.phrase: extreme cold, everything sheathed in ice, brittle frozen surfaces

Reheating.phrase: rising heat, faint glow of distant geothermal vents, heat-warped metal

_biomassNote: Biomass — скалярная ось «органической порчи» (env.md §12, мутировавшие гномьи биореакторы). По умолчанию следует за depth (см. axis_rules.json biomassIntensity, зеркалит anomaly), но перекрывается selection.biomass. Подавляется в холодных зонах правилом optimizer_rules.json.

biomassModifiers.phrase: faint organic film in the crevices, patches of pale fungal growth
creeping fleshy growths spreading over the surfaces, pulsing biomass in the cracks, mutated dwarven bio-reactor residue
rampant organic corruption engulfing the walls, throbbing masses of biomass, mutated fleshy intrusions, dripping membranes

_artifactNote: Artifact — скалярная ось плотности гномьих артефактов/техно-свечения (LevelProfile.ArtifactDensity, magic_and_artifacts.md). Чисто авторская: default 0, задаётся вручную (не выводится из глубины). Подавляется при Origin=Natural правилом optimizer_rules.json.

artifactModifiers.phrase: a few scattered dwarven artifacts, faint glowing runes on an idle device
numerous dwarven artifacts and machinery, glowing runic inscriptions, active mechanisms
dense concentration of dwarven artifacts, banks of humming machinery, walls of glowing runes, powerful active devices
